project_type: Full-stack SaaS: FastAPI backend + React (Vite) frontend PWA
build_system: pip for backend, npm/vite for frontend
test_framework: No dedicated test framework configured; validation is manual/AST-based
build_command: cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt (backend); cd frontend && npm install && npm run build (frontend)
test_command: python -c 'import ast; ast.parse(open("file").read())' for Python syntax validation; npx tsc --noEmit for TypeScript
verification_instructions: 1. Validate Python syntax with AST parse. 2. Validate TypeScript with tsc --noEmit. 3. Confirm key patterns are present with grep.
setup_instructions: pip install -r backend/requirements.txt; cd frontend && npm install
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. No Supabase instance available for runtime testing. Validation is syntax/type-based.
contribution_requirements: Vietnamese UI labels. Supabase for DB/auth. FastAPI backend with Pydantic models.
key_patterns: Staff creation pattern: create_staff() in staff_service.py inserts into invitations table with role + org_id + email. google_auth() in auth_service.py checks invitations by email on login, auto-assigns role and org. Invitations table has CHECK constraint including 'renter'. RenterCreate model uses Pydantic BaseModel. Frontend uses React Query + Axios API client.
directory_structure: backend/app/services/ (business logic), backend/app/models/ (Pydantic), backend/app/routes/ (FastAPI routers), frontend/src/pages/ (React pages), frontend/src/api/ (API client), frontend/src/types/ (TS interfaces), PRD_RentalManagement_SaaS.md (product spec)
